EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: DAENERYS turns to the Unsullied.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: An Unsullied pierces a slave master though the heart with his spear. KRAZNYS looks on in panic.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: BARRISTAN draws his sword as the Unsullied follow DAENERYS's command.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: Drogon unleashes his fire breath, consuming KRAZNYS, who screams in agony as he burns. The Unsullied attack and quickly overwhelm the guards. Drogon flies free, spouting fire above the courtyard.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: The courtyeard is filled with smoke and charred bodies. JORAH surveys the carnage and reaches DAENERYS. She walks forward to inspect he Unsullied, who are back in formation. She mounts a white horse, and rides among them.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: One Unsullied begins tapping his spear rhythmically in the sand. Soon others join him, and more still until the sound becomes thunderous and unanimous. JORAH and BARRISTAN look on.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: DAENERYS rides away from the main gate with her Dothraki and  with MISSANDEI, JORAH and BARRISTAN. The 8000 Unsullied march behind her. She tosses away the whip. The three dragons fly overhead.
EpisodeName: And Now His Watch Is Ended

Text: EXT. MEEREEN AT NIGHT
A Tent outside of Meereen.
MISSANDEI is teaching GREY WORM how to read by a fire.
DAENERYS and BARRISTAN SELMY enter. They stand
DAENERYS and BARRISTAN SELMY exit, followed by GREY WORM.
EXT. MEEREEN.

Overhead, the shadow of a flying dragon soars in the moonlight. On the ground, the Unsullied run through the rocky landscape. They strain to open a gate in the rockface. GREY WORM lights a torch as do the other Unsullied. They travel through the sewer tunnel.
Many slaves are gathered in the dark chamber, seating and standing.
The slaves look at one another.
GREY WORM and the Unsullied enter.
The slaves are surprised to see them. ELDER MEEREEN SLAVE and MOSSADOR stand.
GREY WORM and the other Unsullied remove their bundles from around their shoulders. The weapons clank as they hit the ground. The salves gather round, and a few tentatively pick up some swords.
EXT. Meereen streets at night
GREAT MASTER #1 and two guards  walk the empty streets. They encounter some grafitti reading "Kill the Masters."

They look up to a high tower where a Targaryen flag is waving. Suddenly, a mob of slaves comes running at them. The guards run, leaving GREAT MASTER #1 to his own devices. He tries to flee, but more slaves pour around each corner. The slaves shout and set upon him.
EXT. Meereen streets at day
DAENERYS walks among the cheering slaves, flanked by children.
DAENERYS, JORAH and BARRISTAN SELMY walk down the steps on the cliff, surrounded by cheering slaves.
They ascend to the overlook, joining GREY WORM and the Unsullied.
DAENERYS looks to GREY WORM, who gives a nod to  UNSULLIED #1.
The Unsullied march forth, pressing the citizens of Meereen.

An Unsullied nails a Meereen citizen to a cross. Others scream. They line the path up the mountainside, each with one hand nailed to the post, pointing the way. The citizens watch. DAENERYS stands on a platform above, surveying the city, under the Targaryen flag. The screams echo.
EXT. King's Landing.

BRONN and JAIME spar by the sea. JAIME attacks and BRONN parries. JAIME pauses, panting and spins his sword. His skills have improved. They exchange attacks. BRONN presses JAIME, and they deadlock. BRONN grabs JAIME's golden hand and swats him across the face. JAIME falls to the ground.
BRONN tosses JAIME back his hand.
They sit together on a low wall. JAIME drinks.
JAIME doesn't answer.
He tosses the water skin to BRONN and starts to walk way
JAIME exits.
INT. Tyrion's cell
JAIME and TYRION sit in the cell.
INT. Littlefinger's ship.
SANSA looks out on the ocean. Littlefinger enters.
EXT. King's Landing garden
OLENNA and MARGAERY stroll arm-in-arm in the garden.
EXT. Castle Black courtyard
Swords clang as the recruits train.
JON and GRENN spar
JON and GRENN take a break. JON speaks to the recruits.

JON hands GRENN a second sword. They engage, and JON quickly knocks away one of GRENN's swords. GRENN takes a wide swing, JON ducks, then blocks his forearm and puts his blade to GRENN's throat. OLLY smiles in the crowd and GRENN nods, admitting defeat.
OLLY steps forward, ready.
The recruits laugh.
LOCKE and another ranger arm themselves. LOCKE bests the bald one.
ALLISER THORNE and JANOS SLYNT enter.
JON exits.
ALLISER THORNE exits.
JON returns his sword. RECRUIT joins him.
They shake.
INT. King's Landing, CERSEI's chamber.
There is a knocking at CERSEI's door. She drinks, ignoring it. JAIME enters.
JAIME doesn't answer.
JAIME exits.
INT. Tommen's bedroom.
TOMMEN lies in his bed. He cannot sleep. He hears a door creaking
MARGAERY enters.
MARGAERY sits on his bed.
Sir Pounce jumps onto the bed. MARGAERY pets him
MARGAERY leans in close.
She kisses TOMMEN on the forehead, and exits.
INT. King's Landing
BRIENNE and JAIME are looking at the history of the Kingsguard.
JAIME picks up a displayed sword, weighs it, and then hands it to BRIENNE. She takes it and admires it.
JAIME reveals a suit of armor made for BRIENNE.
EXT. The forrest outside King's Landing
PODRICK beams next to JAIME. BRIENNE paces. BRONN stands in the background.
BRONN approaches and clasps PODRICK's shoulder. He unwraps a bundle.
He pushed the axe onto PODRICK's chest.
PODRICK exits
BRIENNE nods and exits. JAIME watches her and PODRICK ride off.
BRIENNE looks back at JAIME, and rides on.
INT. Castle black library at night.
SAM and JON converse in the library
LOCKE enters
LOCKE exits
INT. Castle Black dining hall
ALLISER THORNE and JANOS SLINT sit at the main table.
JON moves down to the main floor of the hall.
GRENN knocks against the table to get their attention. The hall quiets.
GRENN stands. JON Nods. DOLOROUS EDD stands. Three more join, and then LOCKE does.
INT. Craster's Keep, night.
KARL TANNER drinks from a human skull while sounds of rough sex spill from the background.
RAST pours himself some wine. He is drunk.
He spills wine from the skull into his mouth, greedily.
A man rough arms one of Craster's wives into sexual submission. She wails.
TANNER pushes down another of Craster's wives. RAST admires the back of another.
RAST kisses her shoulder. TANNER grabs some meat and throws it at him.
He stands.
He kicks RAST gently
He slaps RAST, goading him.  RAST; I wouldn't stand a chance. None of us would.
SISSY enters with CRASTER'S BABY.
TANNER pulls a knife.
TANNER sheaths his knife and takes CRASTER'S BABY from SISSY.
He brings CRASTER'S BABY to RAST.
EXT. North of the Wall
RAST carries CRASTER'S BABY. He places the baby on the ground and walks away. CRASTER'S BABY starts to cry.
RAST returns to the keep. Ghost growls in his cage. RASK opens a flask with his teeth.
He takes a drink. Ghost growls. RAST empties the flask in front of him. Ghost starts, and RAST falls back. After he stands, the birds sound and the snow cracks. RAST runs in terror.
HODOR, BRAN, MEERA, JOJEN and Summer lay around the fire. CRASTER'S BABY's cries in the distance.
BRAN focusses inwards and his eyes turn white. Summer leaves the camp, inhabited by BRAN. He runs through the woods towards the cries of CRASTER'S BABY. Suddenly the ground gives way.
BRAN gasps and sits up.
EXT. Craster's Keep, morning.
BRAN, MEERA, JOJEN and JODOR watch the bustle of the keep.
The rangers handle one of Craster's wives roughly.
MEERA and JOJEN exchange a silent look.
A Ranger smashes MEERA in the face, and she falls. BRAN and JOJEN react. HODOR stands.
They are surrounded by Night's Watch traitors.
The traitors yell and prod at HODOR, who is chained around his neck.
HODOR tries to undo his bonds. A traitor stabs him in the leg, and he groans, falling back.
BRAN, MEERA and JOJEN are brought into the keep. BRAN falls to the ground when released.
A traitor sits him up. TANNER comes over to BRAN, and fondles his furs.
BRAN does not answer. TANNER rises and slaps him.
TANNER strokes MEERA's hair and face.
TANNER releases MEERA.
JOJEN starts to spasm. He falls to the ground
TANNER grabs MEERA by the hair and pulls her away from JOJEN. He puts a knife to her throat.
TANNER releases MEERA and walks over. MEERA runs to JOJEN.
EXT. North of the Wall.

A snow storm howls. A lone horseman appears. It is a WHITE WALKER, riding a dead horse. He holds CRASTER'S BABY. The horse walk across a frozen lake, towards an ominous landscape. Ice cracks as the WHITE WALKER brings the baby to  a stone circle with an altar in the middle. He places CRASTER'S BABY there. The NIGHT KING approaches from a line of white walkers. The NIGHT KING picks up the baby, and pierces his cheek with a long fingernail. The baby's eyes turn blue.
TITLE SEQUENCEEXT. BEACH

A man hops out of his boat at night, and grabs a basket of fish. As he carries it on shore, Jorah knocks him out with a punch to the face. Looking around, he drags the man out of the water, and throws two coins on him. Jorah walks over to where he has Tyrion tied up. Tyrion is grunting, trying to cut the ropes binding him with a knife. Jorah picks up the knife and Tyrion. He throws Tyrion and his supplies into the boat, and then pushes it out to sea. Once it gains momentum, he hops in himself.
A number of men walk around doing various tasks on deck. Jaime Lannister looks out from the side of the boat. He turns to the captain.
INT. BELOW DECK
A knife hits a sandbag.
Jaime and Bronn have a stare-off. After a moment, Jaime looks away. Bronn drinks some water.
INT. SMALL COUNCIL CHAMBER
Cersei sits in her chair, looking angry. At the table is Maester Pycelle, Qyburn, Mace Tyrell, and an empty chair.
Mace smiles, as if expecting a laugh. Qyburn and Pycelle both look down. Mace’s smile fades. Cersei smiles.
Ser Meryn walks into the room. Mace turns to look at him, and then back at Cersei.
Mace laughs. Qyburn looks down, lightly chuckling. Mace exits, followed by Ser Meryn.
Pycelle watches her leave.
INT. HIGH SPARROW’S CHAMBER
A note lies on the desk, stamped with the seal of the High Sparrow. The High Sparrow sits behind his desk, across from Cersei. She pours a glass of wine.
Cersei looks unsure, presumably having expected him to say yes. After a moment she smiles and pushes the wine away.
EXT. STREET

A group of Faith Militant, wearing black robes and chains, walk down the street. Many nearby people chatter amongst themselves and look on. They begin breaking open casks of wine, and people begin screaming. One throws some men out of a building. Wine from the broken casks flows down some steps.
INT. A ROOM
We see a man in pain, sweating heavily and biting down on a piece of cloth. Someone begins carving something on his forehead, and his hand scratches and grabs at the table.
EXT. MARKETPLACE

Outside, the Faith Militant destroy a marketplace, smashing things for sale, flipping over tables, and attacking merchants. One merchant, laying on the ground, looks up at some gold cloaks on a castle wall.
The gold cloaks turn around, ignoring him.
INT. A ROOM
The man in the room continues to sweat and bite down on the cloth. His face trembles. The symbol continues being carved.
INT. BROTHEL

A prostitute moans while having sex with a client. Some Faith Militant walk in and interrupt. She shrieks as one grabs her by the hair and pulls her off of the man. Another comes in grinning and strikes the man with a stick. The prostitute is forced out of the room. Some more men interrupt an orgy. Two women start screaming. They begin beating some of the participants, and taking others out of the room. Olyvar attempts to confront a member of the Faith Militant as the man drags out a prostitute.

The man elbows Olyvar in the face and continues on his way. After most of the Faith’s Militant are gone, Olyvar hears a scream. He walks towards the source of the scream, blood running from his noise, and hears another scream.
Olyvar stands just outside the doorway of a large room. Inside, a group of militants, most of them armed, stand around a male prostitute and his male client. Both are naked and bloody on the floor.
The client begins crying. Olyvar backs out of the doorway and begins running away. The client screams.
INT. A ROOM

Someone finishes carving the symbol on the man’s head. The carver walks away and the man, revealed to be Lancel Lannister, sits up, breathing heavily. The symbol on his forehead is the symbol of the Faith Militant.
EXT. STAIRWELL

A number of Faith’s Militant, all armed, walk down a stairwell. They enter a clearing, where Loras Tyrell is sparring with another man. Some people are spectating. The militants, including Lancel, approach the fight. Loras, having knocked the other man to the ground, removes his helmet. He hands his sword to another man, who hands Loras a drink. He suddenly becomes aware of the presence of the militants.
The militants grab Loras.
INT. HALLWAY
Margaery walks down a hallway. She pushes a set of doors open, enters Tommen’s chambers, and angrily puts her hands on a table. Tommen is eating, and looks up at her, surprised.
INT. CERSEI’S CHAMBERS
Tommen walks into Cersei’s chambers. Cersei is staring out of a window and drinking wine.
EXT. THE GREAT SEPT
A group of kingsguard lead Tommen to the Great Sept.

The party stops. Tommen gets out and goes to the steps of the Sept on foot, followed by guards. A number of people are seen milling about around the base of the steps. Some Faith Militant stand guarding the steps. They block Tommen and his guards from walking up.
The kingsguard and militants both adjust their stances, ready for a fight. A number of other people begin to watch. Some people begin yelling at Tommen.
Tommen begins walking away, followed by his guards.
INT. TOMMEN’S CHAMBERS
Tommen opens the doors to his chambers, finding it empty.
Margaery enters from outside.
EXT. CASTLE BLACK
Some Night’s Watchmen spar in the courtyard. A number of others look on. Stannis and Selyse watch from some stairs.
Melisandre and Selyse stare at each other. After a moment, Selyse walks away.
Stannis turns back. They both watch Jon sparring.
INT. JON’S CHAMBER
Jon sits at his desk. Sam hands him various letters to sign, one by one.
Sam’s face grows dark after reading the next letter. When Jon finishes signing the letter to Lord Wibberley, Sam hands it to him, saying nothing. Jon begins signing, but hesitates.

Jon hesitates another moment, and then relents and signs the letter. He leans his chair back, and Sam gathers up all of the signed letters. He walks away, almost bumping into Melisandre as she enters Jon’s chambers.
Sam and Melisandre both look at Jon. Jon nods at Sam, and he leaves. Melisandre closes the door behind him, and Jon straightens up his posture.
She opens up her robes, naked underneath. She leans back, and takes Jon’s hand, slowly leading it up her body to cup her breast.
Melisandre smiles and looks down at Jon’s hand. Jon looks too. Realizing that she is no longer holding it there, he quickly pulls it away. Melisandre caresses Jon’s face and sits on his lap.
Jon keeps her from unbuttoning his coat any further, breathing heavily.
Melisandre stands up, closes her robes, and walks away. After opening the door to leave, she turns to Jon.
Jon’s mouth opens a bit. She smirks and leaves.
INT. STANNIS’S ROOM

Stannis sits at his desk, reading something. There’s a knock at the door. After a moment, Shireen enters. Stannis looks up at her and then back down at his reading material. She closes the door. She smiles, but after Stannis doesn’t return her smile, she walks over to a nearby dresser and begins playing with the objects on top of it.
Shireen fiddles with the objects in her hands. Stannis looks down.
Shireen puts down the objects she was playing with, and turns to leave. Before opening the door, she turns back to Stannis.
Stannis looks up surprised. He puts down what he was doing. Shireen looks down.
After a moment, Shireen hugs Stannis. At first hesitant, he hugs her back.
INT. TOMBS UNDERNEATH WINTERFELL

Sansa lights a candle on a tomb. She then walks over to Lyanna’s tomb and places a candle in the hand of Lyanna’s statue. She then leans down to pick a dusty feather off of the ground. As she blows off the dust, a figure is seen approaching in the background.
Baelish chuckles and pats her shoulder. He turns and leaves as Sansa watches him.
EXT. BOAT

At night, Bronn and Jaime sit in a boat. Bronn rows to shore alone. Looking across at Jaime, Jaime holds up his fake hand. Bronn begrudgingly goes back to rowing alone. After they get to shore, they carry their boat in, and hide it in some tall grass. They then both walk away.

Jaime awakens to find Bronn standing over him with a knife. His eyes widens and he moves to the side as Bronn brings his knife down on a snake that was about to bite Jaime. Jaime looks at the snake and Bronn pulls his knife out of it.
Bronn and Jaime sit at a fire. Bronn cooks the snake while Jaime puts gloves on.
While Bronn is distracted eating, Jaime gets rid of his food.
They both get up and gather their things. Bronn stomps out the fire. The scene cuts to them walking through some tall grass later.
A horse neighs in the distance. Jaime looks around. A group of Dornish riders approach. Bronn and Jaime hide in the grass. Jaime watches the riders.
Bronn turns to look at the riders.
The rider holds up his hand, and the party stops, having spotted Jaime and Bronn’s footsteps.

Bronn and Jaime look at each other. They pull out their swords. Bronn puts his down in the sand, and then flings a knife into the throat of a rider. He then kills another, stabbing him and knocking him off of his horse. A third charges him, and Bronn knocks him off of his horse as well. However, he survives. Bronn turns to Jaime.

Bronn approaches the fourth and final rider. Jaime turns to the injured rider, who is revealed to be much larger than Jaime. They begin fighting. In the background, Bronn knocks the fourth rider off of his horse. As Jaime and the man fight, Jaime is slowly pushed back, down a hill. He falls over and begins rolling to escape his attacker. He loses his balance and his sword is knocked away. As the attacker brings his sword down to kill Jaime, Jaime brings his gold hand up to block it. The sword gets stuck in Jaime’s hand. As the attacker is stuck trying to remove the sword, Jaime picks his back up, kills him, and kicks him down the hill.

Bronn turns and walks away. Jaime looks back down the hill, and then to his hand. Failing to shake the sword off, he is forced to dislodge it by kicking it out of his own hand. Bronn is then seen cleaning his sword off on the clothes of one of the dead riders. He sheaths his sword as Jaime approaches.
Jaime walks away as Bronn’s face drops. He begins dragging a body.
EXT. BEACH

Elaria, in all black, swiftly rides down a beach on horseback. She approaches a tent. Nearby are some more horses, and in the tent are Nymeria, Obara, and Tyene. Tyene exits the tent to meet her as she dismounts.
Tyene and Elaria embrace.
Nymeria uses a whip to knock a bucket away. Underneath is the captain who brought Jaime and Bronn to Dorne, buried neck-deep in sand and covered in scorpions.
Oberyn tossed his spear at my feet and said, "Girl or boy, we fight our battles. But the Gods let us choose our weapons." My father pointed to the spear, and then to my mother's tears.
Obara picks up a spear that was sticking out of the sand. She twirls it around for a moment, and then tosses it through the captain’s head, killing him.
Elaria and Tyene smile.

Jorah steers the boat as Tyrion, tied up and gagged, tries to speak. He only succeeds in mumbling. Eventually he stops trying to say real words, and instead only tries to be as loud as possible, to annoy Jorah. Jorah comes over and ungags him, and then walks back over to continue steering.
Jorah stops steering and approaches Tyrion. Tyrion holds out his hands again, but Jorah strikes him, knocking him unconscious. He then goes back to steering, looking worried.
EXT. BALCONY OVERLOOKING THE CITY
Daenerys and Ser Barristan stand on the balcony.
INT. AUDIENCE CHAMBER
EXT. MARKETPLACE

A prostitute and a soldier laugh with each other. Another soldier talks with some women. Some Sons of the Harpy kill all of the soldiers in the area, causing panic. In a nearby alley, some Unsullied march. Hearing the chaos, they begin running towards the market. They find the prostitute crying over the body of the dead soldier.

She gestures in the direction the sons went. The Unsullied run in that direction. When they are out of view, she stops her act and wipes the tears away. The Unsullied enter a corridor, expecting to catch the sons. Instead, they themselves are ambushed from every direction by Sons of the Harpy. After a tense few moments, a fight breaks out. During the fight, one of the Unsullied’s helmet is knocked off, and is revealed to be Grey Worm. Another fight breaks out elsewhere. The two Unsullied there are killed almost immediately. Barristan walks down an alley and, upon noticing the chaos, heads to the fighting. Grey Worm is badly injured, and with his party killed, also badly outnumbered. Unsullied are shown being killed elsewhere. Grey Worm continues holding off the sons, and Barristan arrives to assist him. They are able to kill all of the sons, but are both seriously injured in the process. They fall unconscious, and the camera pans up to show them surrounded by all of the dead sons and Unsullied.
END EPISODE
Longclaw is lying on a table. DOLOROUS EDD lifts and admires it, then turns to JON SNOW who is putting some items in a bag.
JON SNOW smiles. DOLOROUS EDD places Longclaw on the table.
A single horn sounds outside. JON SNOW and DOLOROUS EDD look to the doorway.

The southern gates open. SANSA, BRIENNE, and PODRICK enter the courtyard on horseback. The Night’s Watch and the Wildlings all watfch them. TORMUND stares intently at BRIENNE. The trio dismount from their horses. JON SNOW and DOLOROUS EDD emerge onto a balcony overlooking the courtyard. SANSA slowly spins around until she and JON SNOW lock eyes. JON SNOW descends from the balcony and walks to SANSA. They stare at each other and then embrace.
JON SNOW and SANSA are sitting by the fire. SANSA lifts a bowl to her lips and drinks from it.
JON SNOW chuckles.
SANSA laughs, then holds out her hand for JON SNOW’s horn of ale. JON SNOW gives it to her. She sips, then coughs. JON SNOW laughs.
SANSA stands and walks to a table. She places her bowl down on it.
JON SNOW stands and turns to face SANSA.
MELISANDRE is looking out over the edge of the balcony. DAVOS approaches her.
MELISANDRE walks away from DAVOS and down into the courtyard. DAVOS follows her.
MELISANDRE continues to walk away, but DAVOS grabs her arm to stop her.
BRIENNE approaches.
BRIENNE stares at MELISANDRE.
BRIENNE walks away. MELISANDRE walks in the opposite direction. DAVOS stares at BRIENNE.
ROBIN drops the bow and arrow and runs to LITTLEFINGER. They embrace.
LITTLEFINGER ushers ROBIN to the rear of the carriage.
ROBIN and LITTLEFINGER pull a sheet from the back of the carriage, revealing a cage with a falcon inside. The falcon squawks. ROBIN gasps.
The ensuing conversation momentarily distracts ROBIN from admiring the falcon. YOHN ROYCE approaches LITTLEFINGER slowly.
YOHN ROYCE looks to ROBIN.
The surrounding knights begin to approach YOHN ROYCE. YOHN ROYCE walks closer to ROBIN.
YOHN ROYCE turns back to look at LITTLEFINGER.
YOHN ROYCE turns back to ROBIN.
YOHN ROYCE bows and walks a few feet away from the engagement.
LITTLEFINGER turns and walks towards YOHN ROYCE.
TYRION begins walking away. The others follow.
TYRION and VARYS begin ascending the stairs to the Great Pyramid.
TYRION and VARYS turn back to face MISSANDEI and GREY WORM.
TYRION We enter these negotiations with open eyes. Trust me. My own recent experience with slavery has taught me the horrors of that institution.
TYRION stammers.
TYRION and VARYS proceed up the steps. MISSANDEI and GREY WORM follow.
TYRION, VARYS, MISSANDEI, and GREY WORM are sitting in attendance to three masters, YEZZAN ZO QAGGAZ, RAZDAL MO ERAZ, and BELICHO PAENYMION.
GREY WORM stares intently at YEZZAN.
The masters look at each others.
TYRION picks up a bell from the table beside him and rings it.
Three women enter. Each one sits in the lap of one of the masters.
TYRION exits. VARYS, MISSANDEI, and GREY WORM follow.
A group of commoner representatives are gathered together at the foot of the throne, whispering in Valyrian. TYRION, MISSANDEI, and GREY WORM enter on the throne platform.
TYRION begins to descend the steps towards the men. MISSANDEI and GREY WORM follow.
TYRION and company reach the bottom of the steps so they are face to face with the men.
MISSANDEI pauses and looks at TYRION.
TYRION smiles.
TYRION, GREY WORM, and MISSANDEI are walking together.
JORAH and DAARIO are walking to the top of a mountain crag. JORAH lags behind and stops to catch his breath. DAARIO turns back to him.
DAARIO chuckles.
JORAH stares at DAARIO for a few moments and then continues along the path.
JORAH turns back to face DAARIO.
JORAH and DAARIO crawl to the edge of the ridge and look below. Vaes Dothrak sprawls across the valley floor.
JORAH points to the eastern division of Vaes Dothrak, and then to the western division.
JORAH stands and walks off to the side. He begins undoing his sword belt.
DAARIO hands over his weapons, except for his dagger. JORAH holds his hand out for the dagger.
DAARIO flips the knife around in his hand.

DAARIO kisses and strokes the knife, then motions to hand it to JORAH. He spots the patch of greyscale on JORAH’s arm through a hole in his sleeve. JORAH pinches the fabric of his sleeve together to cover up the greyscale.
DAARIO gestures with the dagger.
JORAH walks to the side and stares into space.
Dothraki men and women are celebrating in the streets. JORAH and DAARIO are sneaking through the stables. They crouch down in front of a railing and see a Dothraki man and woman fornicating.
JORAH and DAARIO sneak into an alleyway. They move through the alley, but spot two Dothraki men coming their way. JORAH grabs DAARIO.
JORAN and DAARIO walk out to greet the Dothraki men. They proceed to speak in Dothraki.
The Dothraki man inclines his head towards his fellow man.

The second Dothraki man runs down the alleyway. DAARIO darts after him. JORAH swings at the first Dothraki man, but misses. The Dothraki man knees him in the face, knocking him to the ground. DAARIO continues to pursue the other Dothraki man. JORAH strikes his foe twice, but both are blocked. The Dothraki man strikes back with a punch to the face that sends JORAH sprawling. In the alley, just before the other Dothraki man reaches the common area, DAARIO grabs him from behind, places his hand over his mouth, and then snaps his neck. JORAH is rebuffed by his foe a third time. He attempts to throw sand in the Dothraki man’s face, but he dodges out of the way. JORAH climbs to his knees, but the Dothraki man grabs him by the throat and begins choking him. DAARIO stabs the Dothraki man from behind, killing him.
DAARIO tucks the dagger away in his shirt. JORAH climbs to his feet.
DAARIO grabs a large rock and smashes the dead Dothraki man with it several times.
DAENERYS is sitting among the Dosh Khaleen. The women whisper among themselves, but the leader sits beside DAENERYS. They begin to speak in Dothraki.
The Lhazareen woman takes DAENERYS outside the temple. They walk together.
DAENERYS and the Lhazareen woman smile at each other.
The pair round a bend to a secluded desert outcropping.
DAARIO grabs the Lhazareen woman from behind, covers her mouth, and places his dagger against her neck. JORAH is standing behind DAARIO.
DAENERYS grabs DAARIO’s dagger-carrying hand, and he drops it away from the Lhazareen woman’s neck.
DAENERYS looks at the Lhazareen woman.

JAIME cuts her short with a hungry kiss. She returns in kind.

The Targaryen fleet cuts sails at a fine clip. GREY WORM and MISSANDEI stand together on deck. MISSANDEI discreetly clasps GREY WORM's hand. He looks down at their hands and the smile at one another.
TYRION sits, talking with VARYS, who stands nearby.

A ship drops anchor, and another furls its sails.  Others in the distance have already set anchor. Rhaegal and Drogon fly overhead, with DAENERYS riding. They soar over the castle, enjoying themselves. Suddenly, a huge bolt pierces Rhaegal's chest. He screeches in pain. DAENERYS is baffled and distraught. Rhaegal struggles to continue flying. Another bolt plunges into his chest, and a third pierces his neck. Blood spurts and the mighty dragon tumbles towards the sea.

TYRION and VARYS race to the deck, in time to see Rhaegal plunge into the sea just off the side of their ship, upside down and unconscious. Men shout in confusion and race around the deck. Rhaegel disappears below the foamy splash.

DAENERYS looks down in horror. Another giant bolt zooms just above her head. She ducks in surprise, and looks up to see the Ironborn fleet appear from behind the craggy shores of Blackwater. Scorpions have been mounted on their foredecks. EURON himself mans one of the scorpions. His crew repositions the huge siege weapon for another shot. Rage takes over DAENERYS as she guides Drogon to dive towards the Ironborn. She screams a war cry. EURON patiently waits for his shot. The Ironborn let loose a volley of bolts, forcing DAENERYS to veer away from her attack dive. Drogon escapes unscathed, tailed by bolts as he retreats. DAENERYS reels and seeths.
MISSANDEI and TYRION watch DAENERYS fly away.
DAENERYS is consumed by fury. Then she lowers he head in mourning.
EURON watches DAENERYS fly away. He smiles as his men repositions his weapon towards the vulnerable Targaryen ships.
MISSANDEI runs to GREY WORM's side.
MISSANDEI hesitates.
MISSANDEI retreats.

The volley of giant bolts takes apart the Targaryen ships. GREY WORM is knocked off his feet by the devastating force of impact.

The sea spurts over the railings as the massive bolts destroy the hull. TYRION pivots away from the attacking side and is nearly impaled  on a whistling bolt. He falls backwards with a grunt. He quickly swivels back to his feet and changes direction. Another mighty bolt screams through the air in front of him, and destroys the railing on the far side of the deck. TYRION tries to continue towards the stern of the ship, but the dangerous bolts continue relentlessly, causing devastation and carnage. With no other options, TYRION jumps overboard to escape.
TYRION treads water. He looks up as a felled mast comes down on top of him. The screen goes black.

Unsullied drag their comrades through the surf and onto the shore. They cough and gasp. VARYS and TYRION lie on the shore, VARYS coughing uncontrollably. TYRION pants. GREY WORM staggers to the shore and desperately looks around.
GREY WORM runs back into the water, his eyes scanning for his love.
He dives into the water and swims out to search for her.

EURON approaches.

JAIME turns and mounts his horse. BRIENNE sobs. JAIME rides away, leaving her alone with her tears.

VARYS, GREY WORM, DAENERYS and TYRION stand in front of the phalanx of Unsullied soldiers. High above them atop the gate, CERSEI, EURON and the MOUNTAIN look down upon them. MISSANDEI stands with them, bound and very scared. They are flanked by a long line of scorpions, loaded, manned and ready. The small company of Unsullied are vastly outnumbered by the archers and soldiers of King's Landing. An Unsullied solder shout and the company thump their spears to attention.
The gate rattles and QYBURN walks out. TYRION steps forward to meet him. They come together half way between the gate and the Unsullied.
Having heard enough, TYRION walks past QYBURN so that he can address CERSEI directly. As he approaches the wall, The Kingsguard respond to the thread.

The scores of archers draw their bows back, aiming at TYRION. The Imp continues to approach until he is within shouting distance. Looking down on him with contempt, CERSEI raises her hand, ready to give the order to her soldiers. She makes a fist and brings her arm gently to her side. Her men stand down. TYRION nods, gratefully.
CERSEI weights his words. DAENERYS looks on, both anxious and angry. CERSEI steps forward next to MISSANDEI. In response, DAENERYS and GREY WORM move closer.

Horror and disbelief shows on the faces of DAENERYS and GREY WORM. TYRION mouths "No". CERSEI smiles cruelly. She looks to the MOUNTAIN, who steps forward, drawing his great sword. He sliced through MISSANDEI's neck in sweeping cut. Her head and body fall from the top of the gate to the ground below. GREY WORM turns away, unable to watch. His face twitches and be breathes raggedly.

Atop the wall, CERSEI looks down, satisfied. EURON looks pleased. TYRION turns around, dejected. He looks at DAENERYS, who struggles to contain her anger. She turns and walk away, though the Unsullied soldiers. TYRION knows he has failed her. CERSEI savors her cruel moment. DAENERYS fumes and boils with fury as she walks away.

Text: ROBB and BRYNDEN TULLY, waist deep in the river, release the funeral boat of HOSTER TULLY. They return to the dock to rejoin the somber and silent CATELYN and  TALISA.  EDMURE steps forward, holding a bow while the others look on. He lights the arrow and fires an arcing shot at the distant boat. The arrow splashes wide of its mark. Perturbed and embarrassed, EDMURE looks back, then draws another arrow to ignite. He shoots, and this arrow also splashes errantly, while the boat drifts further downstream. The large crowd near the dock murmurs. ROBB laughs under his breath and BRYNDEN looks impatient. EDUMRE takes a breath and unleashes a nervous shot that also splashes uselessly. Fed up, BRYNDEN pushes EDMURE aside and takes his bow. CATELYN, ROBB and TALISA try to maintain their composure. BRYNDEN lights an arrow, aims carefully, and unleashes an arcing shot. As the arrow flies, he turns and tosses the bow back to EDMURE, and walks off. Moments later, the arrow lands in the boat, setting it aflame. CATELYN is relieved. BRYNDEN continues to walk away. EDMURE watches as the flaming boat disappears at the river's bend.

She picks up one of the two remaining empty chairs and places it directly next to TYWIN, then sits while the others smirk. The dwarves line up on the stage.
The crowd applauds. RENLY DWARF starts the prance about the stage.

TYRION and SANSA are not amused.
JOFFREY DWARF shoots and arrow and hits STANNIS DWARF.
The crowd applauds. STANNIS DWARF runs off the stage, crying.
JOFFREY is enjoying the spectacle, but MARGAERY is not.
JOFFREY DWARF and ROBB DWARF are having a stand off.
They run past one another without landing a blow.
This time, JOFFREY DWARD knocks off ROBB DWARF"s wolf helmet.
SANSA is mortified. JOFFREY laughs hysterically while MARGAERY looks at him, appalled.
ROBB DWARF falls. The crowd applauds. JOFFREY DWARF claims victory.
JOFFREY grabs his golbet.
JOFFREY DWARF feigns sodomizing the wolf head. SANSA is motionless. JOFFREY spits out his wine, laughing.
The players take their bow and the crowd applauds. JOFFREY stands.
The crowd laughs. Tyrion stands.
TYRION sits, and JOFFREY is angered at his insults. The crowd quiets. JOFFREY walks over and pours his wine on TYRION's head. MARGAERY sits motionless.
TYRION stands and walks over to JOFFREY, who purposely drops his goblet. As TYRION tried to pick it up, he kicks it away.
TYRION kneels down to get the goblet. SANSA watches JOFFREY. She picks up the goblet and hands it to TYRION. He brings it to JOFFREY.
TYRION pours wine for JOFFREY in front of CERSEI, and hands it to him.
TYRION does not budge.
The crowd applauds, and the attention turns to the giant pie carried in by four men.
JOFFREY strides forward, and hews the pie with his sword. To his surprise, doves are released from the pie. He looks triumphant.
The pie is served to the guests.
MARGAERY feeds a forkful of pie to JOFFREY.
TYRION looks to SANSA.
TYRION and fumes has he gets the goblet for JOFFREY. JOFFREY drinks deeply.
JOFFREY grabs his own throat, choking.
JOFFREY turns towards the crowd, choking and staggering.
JAIME runs to JOFFREY, as he vomits.
CERSEI runs to them.
TYRION and MARGAERY watch, aghast. CERSEI and JAIME continue to try to help JOFFREY.
JOFFREY gurgles and chokens. His face is turning purple, his eyes glazed, vomit lining his cheeks. He spasms.

Blood streams out of JOFFREY's nose. He convulses painfully. CERSEI cries as she watches him. He reaches a hand out towards TYRION, who at that moment picks up the goblet from before him. JOFFREY gaps a final time as blood continues to stream from his nose, his face a horrid shade of purple. He dies.
Two guards grab TYRION. CERSEI looks upon the lifeless body of JOFFREY.

Text: THREE-EYED RAVEN is tangled in the roots of the great weirwood. His eyes are pure white. BRAN is lying below the tangle, gripping a single root. His eyes are also pure white.

YOUNG NED and YOUNG BENJEN are sparring with wooden swords in the commons. BRAN and THREE-EYED RAVEN are standing on a balcony above the courtyard, watching. YOUNG NED knocks YOUNG BENJEN to the ground.
YOUNG NED helps YOUNG BENJEN to his feet.
YOUNG NED and YOUNG BENJEN begin sparring again. BRAN looks around the commons at the citizens of Winterfell going about their business.
YOUNG LYANNA rides into the courtyard on a horse. She circles around YOUNG NED and YOUNG BENJEN.
Closeup on THREE-EYED RAVEN. He turns to look at BRAN, but BRAN has already walked away. BRAN walks closer to the group. YOUNG LYANNA is being helped off her horse by YOUNG HODOR.
YOUNG LYANNA turns and looks at YOUNG HODOR.
BRAN turns to look at YOUNG HODOR. THREE-EYED RAVEN reaches BRAN’s side.
YOUNG LYANNA walks over to YOUNG HODOR with a wooden sword and shield.
YOUNG HODOR takes the sword and shield.
YOUNG HODOR walks over to YOUNG BENJEN. They both ready to commence sparring, but stop when NAN appears.
NAN takes YOUNG HODOR by the ear and leads him away.
THREE-EYED RAVEN touches BRAN on the shoulder.

BRAN is released from the vision. He gasps, then lets go of the root. The white fades from his eyes. A CHILD OF THE FOREST is sitting nearby, staring at him. He props himself up on his wrists and looks at THREE-EYED RAVEN.
CHILD OF THE FOREST and THREE-EYED RAVEN exchange a glance. BRAN turns to HODOR, who is sitting with his back against a wall.
HODOR carries BRAN outside and sets him down in the snow. MEERA is sitting in the snow at the base of the great weirwood, staring out at the tundra.
MEERA turns and looks at BRAN.
MEERA casts her eyes down and looks away.

MEERA scoffs and turns away. HODOR picks BRAN up and carries him back inside. A side view of MEERA reveals the same CHILD OF THE FOREST who was watching BRAN, sitting among some stones and frozen shrubbery..
DAVOS turns to address the Night’s Watch faithfuls.
DAVOS walks over to Longclaw, JON SNOW’s sword, and picks it up.
DAVOS unsheathes Longclaw. The faithfuls follow suit, drawing their own blades.ALLISER THORNE turns to address a Night’s Watchman.

The Night’s Watchman lifts and large hammer and walks over to the door. He begins slamming the hammer against the door repeatedly. GHOST begins to growl and bark. DAVOS and company ready themselves for battle. After a number of swings, the Night’s Watchman with the hammer breaks a hole in the door. A loud thudding can be heard somewhere behind ALLISER THORNE and company. They turn to see what the noise is. The thudding is coming from one of the courtyard’s main gates. WUN WUN breaks down the gate and the Wildlings led by TORMUND and DOLOROUS EDD rush into the courtyard. The Night’s Watch loyal to ALLISER THORNE have bows drawn at the Wildlings but do not fire. They back up slowly.
ALLISER THORNE draws his sword. A Night’s Watchman charged TORMUND. TORMUND cuts him down. The other Night’s Watch members do not retaliate.

A Night’s Watchman on a balcony shoots WUN WUN in the shoulder with a crossbow bolt. WUN WUN turns to face the man, then grabs him by the legs, slams him against a wall, and tosses his body to the ground in front of ALLISER THORNE. The Night’s Watch members allied to ALLISER THORNE begin dropping their weaponry. TORMUND and DOLOROUS EDD approach ALLISER THORNE, swords drawn.
OLLY shouts and charges at TORMUND with his sword. TORMUND grabs OLLY and disarms him, then tosses him to another man who restrains him. Two men take ALLISER THORNE by the arms.
The men drag ALLISER THORNE, OLLY, and the Night’s Watch betrayers away. TORMUND, DOLOROUS EDD, and DAVOS enter the room where JON SNOW’s body is. They stare down at him and his wounds.
The commoners laugh.

The STORYTELLER walks into a dark alleyway to relieve himself. He is drunk. GREGOR walks up behind him. The STORYTELLER looks up at GREGOR. GREGOR bounces his head off the wall, killing him, then walks away.

CERSEI is standing in the center of the room,. She pulls a loose thread from the sleeve of her dress and examines it. GREGOR enters. CERSEI walks past him and exits her chamber. GREGOR follows. When they reach the bottom of the steps, they are confronted by a group of the king’s soldiers.
GREGOR grabs the hilt of his sword. The king’s soldiers also take hold of their weapons. GREGOR looks at CERSEI. CERSEI turns and walks back up the stairs. GREGOR follows.
TOMMEN and JAIME are standing beside the body of MYRCELLA. She has funeral stones over her eyes, with painted eyes on them.
The HIGH SPARROW enters the sept. JAIME takes TOMMEN by the shoulder.
JAIME and TOMMEN to address the HIGH SPARROW.
TOMMEN exits.
The HIGH SPARROW approaches MYRCELLA’s body.
JAIME approaches the HIGH SPARROW.
JAIME grips the hilt of his dagger and partially draws it.
A great number of the Faith Militant encircle JAIME and the HIGH SPARROW on the steps of the sept.
The HIGH SPARROW walks slowly away from JAIME.
CERSEI is looking over the balcony at King’s Landing. TOMMEN enters her chamber.
CERSEI walks in from the balcony.
CERSEI walks over to a side table and drinks a sip of wine. Her back is facing TOMMEN.
CERSEI turns to face TOMMEN.
CERSEI and TOMMEN embrace.
TYRION, VARYS, MISSANDEI, and GREY WORM are gathered together in council. TYRION pours himself a glass of wine. VARYS tsks at him.
TYRION looks at GREY WORM.
VARYS sighs.
TYRION finishes his glass of wine and walks over to the pitcher to pour himself another glass.

TYRION and VARYS enter the dragons’ holding chamber bearing torches. TYRION begins walking slowly down the steps. VARYS remains at the top. When TYRION reaches the floor, he pauses and stares into the darkness. Faint growling can be heard. TYRION stops and looks back at VARYS momentarily. RHAEGAL and VISERION emerge from the shadows. VISERION lights a fire in his mouth and roars at TYRION. RHAEGAL approaches with a small roar.
TYRION chuckles nervously. RHAEGAL growls at TYRION. TYRION approaches cautiously.
TYRION sets down his torch and gets closer to RHAEGAL.
TYRION touches RHAEGAL on the neck.

TYRION takes hold of the piston keeping RHAEGAL’s shackle closed and pulls it free. The shackle falls the ground. TYRION turns around to see VISERION growling at him. VISERION exposes his neck to TYRION. TYRION approaches and releases the piston from VISERION’s shackle. RHAEGAL and VISERION return to the shadows. TYRION picks up his torch and hurries up the steps.
ARYA is sitting on the ground against the wall of a street. The WAIF appears, staff in hand.
ARYA grabs her staff and rushes to her feet. The WAIF smacks ARYA in the face, drawing blood. ARYA approaches the sound of the WAIF’s voice, but the WAIF has already moved to the side.
ARYA swings her staff at the WAIF, but misses. The WAIF hits ARYA in the side.

ARYA swings her staff at the WAIF again, but misses again. The WAIF hits ARYAoin the other side. ARYA rushes towards the WAIF and trips on some steps, falling to the ground. She grabs her staff and stands back up. The WAIF hits ARYA three more times, knocking her to the ground on the third. ARYA stands up and swings at the WAIF again, and misses for a third time. The WAIF hits ARYA in the face, knocking her to the ground again. ARYA is panting heavily. She returns to her feet, screams, and swings her staff around her many times. The WAIF has disappeared. The Faceless Man, taking on the visage of JAQEN H’GHAR, catches ARYA’s staff mid-swing.
JAQEN releases ARYA’s staff.
ARYA turns around and walks to her beggar basket.
ARYA follows JAQEN.
ROOSE, RAMSAY, and LORD KARSTARK are gathered at the dining table, talking. RAMSAY and LORD KARSTARK are standing, while ROOSE remains seated at the head of the table.
ROOSE looks at both his son and lord Karstark. He gets up and stands in front of them.
MAESTER WOLKAN enters and interrupts them.
RAMSAY steps towards his father. They hug.
ROOSE puts his hand on RAMSAY’s shoulder.
RAMSAY stabs ROOSE in the gut with a knife. ROOSE falls to the ground. ROOSE dies. RAMSAY steps away from ROOSE and cleans his knife.
MAESTER WOLKAN does not respond.
RAMSAY glares at MAESTER WOLKAN.
RAMSAY looks down at ROOSE's body.
RAMSAY is standing alone. LADY WALDA walks to RAMSAY carrying her newborn son.
LADY WALDA shows RAMSAY her son.
RAMSAY takes the baby.
LADY WALDA reaches for the baby. RAMSAY hands the baby to her.
RAMSAY and LADY WALDA walk to the kennel and enter. RAMSAY opens the gate. The dogs bark. RAMSAY closes the gate and locks it. LADY WALDA looks around.
The dogs bark even louder.
The baby starts crying. LADY WALDA tries to soothe the baby.
RAMSAY opens the door of a kennel.
RAMSAY opens the doors of all the kennels one by one.
RAMSAY walks back over to LADY WALDA.
LADY WALDA looks at her baby.
RAMSEY whisles at the dogs. They exit their pens and attack LADY WALDA and the baby. LADY WALDA screams. The dogs kill them.
THEON is gathering wood. He glances at SANSA and BRIENNE, who are in conversation. PODRICK is making a fire.
SANSA smiles.
SANSA pauses and tears up.
BRIENNE looks at THEON.
THEON stands up and walks away from PODRICK. SANSA stands and walks to THEON.
SANSA looks to the ground.
SANSA hugs THEON. They both cry.
A storm is raging.
YARA and BALON are standing and speaking. BALON stands at the fireplace with his back to YARA.
YARA places the piece of paper she was reading from on a table.
BALON turns around to face YARA.
BALON walks to YARA.
BALON exits the hall.
Rain is pouring down. BALON begins to cross the unsteady bridge. He leans on the ropes and looks down at the ocean, then sees a cloaked figure on the other side of the bridge.
The hooded figure takes off his hood, revealing his identity. He is EURON GREYJOY. BALON walks a few steps closer.
BALON does not respond.
The wind buffets the bridge back and forth. BALON tries to hold his balance. EURON chuckles.
BALON walks towards his brother.
BALON draws a knife and slashes EURON across the face. EURON throws BALON off the bridge. BALON falls to his death.

Many Ironborn are in attendance for BALON's funeral. AERON GREYJOY and several Drowned Men are gathered around BALON's body. They are performing funeral rites, covering it with rocks, seaweed, and wood. YARA approaches. YARA and the Drowned Men walk BALON's body through the shallows.
DAVOS enters.
DAVOS looks at the fireplace and then at MELISANDRE.
MELISANDRE looks at DAVOS.
MELISANDRE stands and walks away from her chair. DAVOS walks towards her.
MELISANDRE looks at DAVOS.

Text: The girls quickly grab one another’s hands and run off. GREY WORM stands behind her as she turns around to face him. GREY WORM walks up to her.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The camera pans up over the wall and SAMWELL and JON stand next to each other with GHOST, JON’s direwolf, behind them. SAMWELL leans over slightly towards JON.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He pauses and they both look at each other and fall silent. EDD walks up the stair behind them and stands between them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL looks at him and frowns.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL chuckles and EDD looks at him. He turns to see JON laughing too.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL sighs.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The camera rises over the wall and the silhouette of the trees in the distance block the light slowly fading over the horizon.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The fire in the hearth of the hall is lit. Two wooden chairs sit facing it, occupied by JAIME to the left of the fire and TYRION to the right. They both sip on wine.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME looks at TYRION in shock.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME snorts.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION sighs
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION raises his cup to toast.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME raises his and they both go to drink. JAIME stops himself when the door to the hall opens and BRIENNE and PODRICK walk in. JAIME stands up quickly and they both turn to look at the visitors.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION walks over to where the wine is kept, PODRICK starts to walk to him.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: PODRICK turns back to BRIENNE.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: She pauses.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION continues to pour PODRICK’s drink until the cup overflows with wine.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME places another chair in front of the fire.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION pours BRIENNE a drink and hands it to her as she sits down. PODRICK grabs a chair and brings it over and sits down. DAVOS and TORMUND enter the hall.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAVOS stands in front of the fire to warm up.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TORMUND walks up to BRIENNE and stands in front of her.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME, now sitting down next to BRIENNE, glances up.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: She pauses and quickly tries to recover.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TORMUND turns to TYRION and raises his drinking horn.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TORMUND looks at JAIME, over to BRIENNE, and then back to JAIME again.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME sighs and looks over at TYRION who is still standing to the side of the room with his wine. TORMUND grabs a wooden chair and places it with his back to the fire so that he is facing JAIME and BRIENNE. He sits down and leans forwards.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAVOS glances at TORMUND, clearly perplexed.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TORMUND raises the horn to his mouth and starts drinking from it whilst gulping noisily. Everyone stares at him as the drink pours out the horn, mostly down his front.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SANDOR “THE HOUND” CLEGANE sits with back against the battlements drinking alone. ARYA walks up to him and he notices her. She walks closer and SANDOR silently offers the drink. ARYA sits down next to SANDOR and takes a swig. They sit silently staring ahead.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: She pauses.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SANDOR turns to her.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BERIC walks up to the two of them and stops in front of them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BERIC smiles. He turns to look at ARYA.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SANDOR turns to ARYA.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BERIC sits down on a barrel opposite the two.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He points to the wall he’s leaning against. BERIC chuckles and holds his hand out. SANDOR passes him the drink. ARYA stands up and starts walking away from them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: ARYA turns around to look at them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: ARYA exits and SANDOR and BERIC sit in silence.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: A bowstring creaks as an arrow is fired. It hits its target next to two other arrows previously shot. The camera cuts to see ARYA holding a large bow in a dimly lit hallway. She lowers it and picks up another arrow. GENDRY watches from a doorway. She fires another arrow and turns as GENDRY walks up to her.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: GENDRY raises a spear with a dragonglass head. ARYA lays down her bow and takes the spear.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: GENDRY scoffs.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: GENDRY stammers indistinctly.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: GENDRY scoffs.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: GENDRY sighs.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: ARYA pauses and walks up to him.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: ARYA inhales sharply as she pulls GENDRY in and starts kissing him. They start undressing themselves and each other whilst still kissing. She pushes GENDRY back onto a pile of bags as she takes off her top. GENDRY, who is still just wearing his pants, notices a couple scars on ARYA’s side.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: She pulls her own pants off and climbs on top of GENDRY and starts kissing him.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The fire is still lit and the people who were in there earlier still sit there. Opposite the fire sits (from left to right) TORMUND, BRIENNE, JAIME, DAVOS, TYRION and PODRICK. They sit in silence before TYRION breaks it.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAVOS and PODRICK both start laughing.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME stands up to get himself another drink.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: PODRICK looks at her, slightly confused. BRIENNE ignores him.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME places his cup on the table where the wine is kept.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JAIME unsheathes his sword and stands in the middle of the room and holds his sword out.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BRIENNE scoffs.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BRIENNE looks at PODRICK who nods. She stands up, walks to the middle of the room opposite JAIME and kneels before him. PODRICK and DAVOS both turn in their seats to see and TYRION and TORMUND both stand. JAIME places the sword on her right shoulder.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He raises it over her head and places it on her left shoulder.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He raises the sword and places it on her right shoulder again.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He lowers the sword to his side.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BRIENNE smiles as she stands up and the rest of the room all applaud.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BRIENNE smiles ecstatically.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL is walking down the stairs from the battlements
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL notices the two talking down in the courtyard and starts to walk towards them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: We now see JORAH and LYANNA up close.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: LYANNA turns around to see SAMWELL facing them both
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: LYANNA starts to walk off but stops and turns back to JORAH.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: LYANNA exits and SAMWELL walks closer to JORAH.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL raises his sword.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: He hands JORAH the sword and JORAH removes it from its sheath slightly to examine it.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: SAMWELL walks off but stops several feet away and turns back to JORAH.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: Everyone sits around the fire still but DAVOS is standing next to where the wine is.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAVOS sits back down.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: TYRION chuckles.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: BRIENNE shakes her head. TYRION turns to TORMUND who shakes his head too.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: PODRICK starts singing “Jenny of Oldstones”.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: As PODRICK continues to sing, SAMWELL and GILLY lay in bed with LITTLE SAME between them.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The camera pans down to show SANSA and THEON sitting opposite each other. PODRICK's singing continues.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The camera pans and we see GENDRY sleeping on the pile of bags and ARYA lays next to him with her eyes open. PODRICK’s singing continues.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: The Unsullied start walking out of the courtyard as MISSANDEI and GREY WORM walk together before he stops her, turns to her, and kisses her. He then turns to leave with the Unsullied and MISSANDEI watches as he leaves. PODRICK’s singing continues.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: Everyone gathers outside the castle as they prepare for battle. JORAH rides on his horse and gazes at the horizon to see only darkness. PODRICK’s singing continues.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAENERYS turns a corner as she sees JON staring at a statute of his biological mother, LYANNA STARK. She walks up to him. He glances at her and smiles as she walks closer. She holds his arm as they both look at the statute together.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAENERYS looks troubled.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JON turns to face DAENERYS.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAENERYS starts to look at him, slightly concerned.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: DAENERYS exhales sharply as she pulls away.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: Suddenly a horn blares and JON turns around.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JON and DAENERYS walk behind the battlements and stand next to TYRION as the three stare out over the wall.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: JON nods at DAENERYS and they both quickly exit. TYRION watches but turns his attention back over the wall. The camera pans away.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: In an icy haze, the mangled legs of a dead horse trot forward before stopping. The camera pans up to show a white walker sitting upon the dead horse and the entire army of white walkers standing in a line upon their horses is slowly revealed. The camera pans around their backs before settling on the faint glow of Winterfell in the distance.
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: CREDITS
EpisodeName: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms

Text: [First scene opens with three Rangers riding through a tunnel, leaving the Wall, and going into the woods. (Eerie music in background) One Ranger splits off and finds a campsite full of mutilated bodies, including a child hanging from a tree branch. A birds-eye view shows the bodies arranged in a shield-like pattern. The Ranger rides back to the other two.]
[GARED grumbles.]
[WILL glares, but obeys. Sometime later, the three Rangers return to the campsite, which is now completely cleared.]
[The three look around, swords drawn. They hear the wind and eerie calls. GARED finds a red cloth in the snow.]

[As he speaks, a CREATURE with glowing blue eyes rises behind ROYCE. ROYCE turns, the CREATURE strikes. The scene shifts to WILL, who hears a man crying out. The three horses stampede past him. He turns and sees someone standing very still in the distance. The figure turns – it’s the child who had been suspended in the tree, now with glowing blue eyes. WILL turns and runs.

GARED is also fleeing, and we hear strange growls and catch glimpses of the CREATURE. Both terrified RANGERS stop, some distance apart, to catch their breath. WILL sees a CREATURE behead GARED. WILL sinks to his knees and the CREATURE tosses GARED’S head to him.]
[Blackout]

TITLE SEQUENCE[Riders from Winterfell come up behind a dazed WILL. The scene shifts to the castle, where BRAN is practicing archery and getting frustrated, under the eyes of JON SNOW and ROBB STARK. JON pats BRAN’S shoulder.]
[We see NED and CATELYN STARK watching from above.]
[Scene shifts to needlework practice with the girls inside the castle.]
[As she murmurs to SANSA about the embroidery, ARYA struggles with her needlework and listens to the arrows hitting and the male laughter outside.]
[Outside, BRAN tries and misses again. Everyone laughs.]

[BRAN pulls the arrow back. An arrow hits the bullseye. BRAN (still with his arrow), JON, and ROBB turn in surprise to see ARYA, who curtsies after her perfect shot. ROBB and JON laugh as Bran takes out after ARYA.]
[RODRICK CASSEL and THEON GREYJOY approach NED and CATELYN on the balcony.]
[NED grimaces.]
[THEON departs.]
[CASSEL nods and departs.]
[NED departs. In the courtyard, ROBB and JON gather the arrows. CATELYN turns and glares down on JON. He looks at her and walks away.]
[Scene shifts, and we see WILL being taken to the block.]
[He and NED face each other.]
NED nods yes, and WILL is positioned on the tree limb that serves as a block. [NED draws Ice from a scabbard held by Theon.]
[NED bows his head over ICE.]
[NED swings ICE and beheads WILL. BRAN does not look away.]
[He walks away. ROBB turns and puts his arm around BRAN and they go to their horses together. NED approaches BRAN.]
[Scene shifts to a dead stag’s head. The Winterfell men gather on the bridge They see a ravaged deer before them.]
[With swords out, they begin to search. NED finds a dead direwolf with antlers through her throat. Her pups are whimpering around her.]
[NED and CASSEL glance at each other.]
[He pulls out the antlers.]
[Jon picks up a pup and offers it to BRAN.]
[Everyone looks at NED, BRAN with great hope.]
[BRAN cradles his pup as JON hands more pups to ROBB.]
[JON walks away, pauses, and hears another whimper.]
[JON pulls up a white wolf pup.]

[Scene shifts to bells ringing at Kings Landing. In front of the Iron Throne, surrounded by druidical looking celebrants, lies the body of JON ARRYN. Up in the balcony, CERSEI watches the scene below as JAIME approaches.]
[Scene shifts to a raven approaching Winterfell. CATELYN crosses a busy courtyard and finds NED in the godswood.]
[Scene shifts to the Winterfell great hall where a great banquet is being prepared.]
[Scene shifts to Robb, Theon, and Jon getting barbered.]

[Scene shifts to the royal procession approaching Winterfell. Bran sees them from his perch high atop a castle wall and clambers nimbly down to tell everyone. CATELYN and LUWIN walk to the courtyard, passing BRAN’s wolf pup.]
[BRAN runs off, followed by his wolf pup.]

[Scene shifts to grand entry of the king’s horses and men. ARYA, wearing a helm and cloak, pushes her way into a tall wagon for a better look. In rides JOFFREY, followed by the HOUND. The other Starks wait in a greeting line.]
[More riders with banners. ARYA scoots past her parents to get in the receiving line.]

[JOFFREY rides up, SANSA smiles at him, ROBB glares at JOFFREY. The HOUND pulls up his helm. The coach carrying CERSEI lumbers in, followed by KING ROBERT. All kneel. ROBERT heaves himself off his horse. NED looks shocked at the sight of his old friend, now fat and red-faced. ROBERT signals for all to rise and looks at NED.]
[NED gives ROBERT a “What about you?” look. They start laughing.]
[CERSEI and her other children descend from the coach.]
ROBERT (to BRAN) Ooh. Show us your muscles. You’ll be a soldier.
[JAIME removes his helm.]
[CERSEI approaches.]
[CERSEI, humiliated in front of all, walks back to JAIME.]
[Scene changes to the crypt.]
[NED kneels.]
[Scene changes to JAIME in the Winterfell settlement. We see Tyrion inside a whorehouse, swilling liquor and laughing as a woman pops into view after servicing him.]
[She climbs on TYRION. JAIME walks in without knocking.]
[JAIME leaves.]
Scene changes to the Winterfell crypt, at Lyanna’s tomb. [Robert places a feather in the hand of her statue.]
[He touches Lyanna’s face.]
[Scene shifts to Daenerys on a balcony in Pentos, across the Narrow Sea.]
[He enters a large chamber.]
[VISERYS nods and starts to leave the chamber. He turns.]
[Daenerys turns and steps into a steaming hot bath with a despairing look on her face.]
[But DAENERYS keeps stepping deeper. The scene shifts to ILLYRIOS, DAENERYS, AND VISERYS outside the mansion, awaiting Khal Drogo.]
[A host of Dothraki come riding up. Khal Drogo wheels his stallion into the front.]

VISERYS (to DAENERYS) Do you see how long his hair is? When Dothraki are defeated in combat, they cut off their braid so the whole world can see their shame. Khal Drogo has never been defeated. He’s a savage, of course, but he’s one of the finest killers alive. And you will be his queen.

[KHAL DROGO watches as DAENERYS walks toward him. She does not hesitate and looks straight at him, although there is fear on her face. KHAL DROGO gazes at her and then leads his horsemen on a charge away.]
[The scene shifts to ILLYRIO, VISERYS, AND DAENERYS ON A GARDEN BALCONY OVERLOOKING THE SEA.]
DAENERYS (pleadingly) I don’t want to be his queen. I want to go home.
[He gives DAENERYS a brotherly kiss on the forehead and walks away. The scene shifts to a bedroom in Winterfell, where CATELYN is fixing SANSA’S hair.]
[CATELYN rolls her eyes.]

[Scene shifts to the Winterfell banquet. Laughter, music, KING ROBERT getting bawdy with a wench. CATELYN and CERSEI watch, CATELYN embarrassed for CERSEI, who looks disgusted. Out in the courtyard, JON takes out his frustration on a fencing dummy. His uncle BENJEN rides up.]
[They hug.]
[BENJEN goes to the banquet.]
[JON looks angry and turns away.]
[TYRION departs. JON picks up his sword and attacks the dummy with new ferocity.]
[The scene shifts back to the banquet, in full raucous swing. NED is off to himself; BENJEN comes up to him.]
[ROBB approaches.]
[KING ROBERT gets even more bawdy with a wench.]
CATELYN (in desperation) Is this your first time in the North, Your Grace?
[They observe SANSA.]
[SANSA approaches and smiles shyly at CERSEI.]
[SANSA nods yes.]
[SANSA departs.]
[SANSA and JOFFREY catch each other’s eye. JOFFREY smiles at her and she turns to her friend.]
[JAIME and NED meet up. JAIME blocks their path.]
[ARYA flips food onto SANSA’s face.]
[CATELYN signals a laughing ROBB to deal with the girls. He hoists up ARYA.]
[The scene shifts to after the banquet. NED and CATELYN are in their bed.]
[There’s a knock at the door.]
[He hands CATELYN a sealed note.]
[CATELYN reads the note, looks up in alarm, and then burns it.]
[The scene shifts to the wild wedding celebration of KHAL DROGO and DAENERYS. Fighting and fornication. DAENERYS looks stricken at everything around her.]
[The sex and violence intensify. Two men fight to the death over a woman each is trying to rape. KHAL DROGO watches avidly.]
[A knight in Westerosi garb appears. KHAL DROGO greets him in Dothraki. It is JORAH MORMONT, bearing books.]
[DANY is presented with a chest with three dragon eggs in it.]
[KHAL DROGO rises and strides forward. DAENERYS follows him, looking sick with fear. The Dothraki crowd behind her as she goes. The KHAL leads her to a white mare.]
[The KHAL puts DANY on her horse and mounts his.]
[The scene shifts to the seaside at sunset. The KHAL begins to unwrap DANY’s dress. She is sobbing. He touches the tears on her face.]
[He takes off her gown and bends her down.]
[The scene shifts to Winterfell. Tyrion and the Hound are seated outside the day after the banquet.]
[The king and Ned come into view.]
[The king’s party rides off, NED nodding goodbye to BRAN, whose wolf pup begins sniffing at his feet.]

[BRAN begins climbing, his wolf pup crying at the bottom of the castle wall. As he nears the top, he hears a woman and man moaning. Peering in the window, he sees CERSEI and JAIME having sex. CERSEI sees BRAN.]
[JAIME runs and grabs BRAN at the window.]
[JAIME looks at CERSEI, who gazes back imploringly.]
[He shoves BRAN out the window.]
/ BLACKOUT /
TITLE SEQUENCEEXT. KING’S LANDING

The Hound and another man grunt as they duel. Men and women look on from nearby. The Hound knocks the other man’s shield away, and knocks the man off of a wall. The camera pans up from the man to where Joffrey stands in a tent, watching.
The Hound removes his helmet. Joffrey turns to Sansa.
Two men drag the man away, leaving behind a trail of blood. A boy walks over to clean up the blood.
The announcer gestures to a man, who then walks over.
The announcer gestures in the opposite direction, but no one comes forward.
Ser Dontos takes off his helmet.
Ser Dontos bows to Joffrey. Joffrey looks over to Ser Meryn.

Ser Meryn and two other kingsguard grab Ser Dontos. They bring him into a more open area nearby. Ser Dontos is forced on his knees. One kingsguard keeps Ser Dontos down. Ser Meryn and the other kingsguard get a funnel and a barrel of wine. Ser Meryn forces the funnel into Ser Dontos’s mouth. The kingsguard with the barrel begins pouring the wine down the funnel. Ser Dontos begins gurgling and struggles a little bit.
The barrel and funnel are removed, and Ser Dontos is released. He pukes out a mixture of blood and wine onto the ground.
Ser Dontos is taken away by kingsguard.
Tyrion, Bronn, and a number of hill tribesman appear from the right. People murmur and look their way.
Tyrion begins to pour himself a glass of wine.
Tyrion gestures towards the Hound. Bronn looks over at the Hound and smiles wryly.
Tyrion takes a sip of his wine.
Tyrion bows to Sansa. Joffrey looks over at her, and back to Tyrion.
Tyrion smirks sympathetically. Sansa looks away.
Tyrion begins walking away from the tent.
INT. SMALL COUNCIL MEETING CHAMBER
The council members sit at a table. A man walks to the table with a covered bird cage.
Cersei gestures to a servant. The servant comes to take the raven off of the table.
Tyrion begins whistling from a distance. Everyone at the table turns to watch him approach.
Tyrion begins drinking his wine.
Tyrion pulls out a letter. He hands it to Varys, who opens it, and begins reading it.
There is a long pause. Cersei looks over at Tyrion.
Tyrion smirks, and takes a sip of his wine. Cersei looks away.
EXT. OUTSIDE WINTERFELL
A knight sits on a horse alone, holding a banner. Winterfell is seen in the background.
INT. INSIDE WINTERFELL’S KEEP
A long queue of people are waiting to speak with Bran. The man speaking is addressing Bran and Maester Luwin, who are both sitting at a large table.
The man walks away. After a moment, Luwin turns to Bran.
EXT. WOODS

The camera changes to first-person. A character is running through the woods, panting.  The character looks up to the red comet above the trees, and then back down to the pool in the godswood. The character approaches the pool and looks down at their reflection, revealing themselves to be Summer, Bran’s direwolf.
INT. BRAN’S BEDROOM
Bran lays in his bed, asleep. His eyes suddenly open.
Hodor walks with Bran on his back, closely following Osha. Osha squats next to some plants. Hodor continues walking.
Osha pockets some of the plant.
Bran points, and Hodor changes direction, heading for the godswood. Osha turns and begins following them.
Osha places Bran on the ground. He begins crawling towards the edge of the pool.
Bran looks at his reflection in the pool.
EXT. DESERT
Some people walk through the desert. The camera pans up to reveal Daenerys, with Drogon on her shoulder, and her Khalasar. Daenerys attempts to feed Drogon some meat, but he refuses.

Doreah looks down dejectedly. Daenerys gets Drogon off of her shoulder and into his cage. At the front of the group, a horse suddenly collapses. Jorah jogs forward to investigate. Daenerys follows after him. Daenerys kneels down to look at the horse. She looks up at Jorah, who shakes his head. Daenerys looks down sadly.
Daenerys says something in Dothraki, calling Rakharo and some others over. She then stands up, and addresses Rakharo and two others.
Rakharo and the other two riders walk away. Later, as Rakharo is almost ready to leave, Daenerys approaches him.
Rakharo and the other two riders take off. Daenerys stares at the red comet, looking troubled.
EXT. WOODS
The large party of Night’s Watchmen continue through the woods on horseback. Sam, Grenn, and Edd surround a sledge trapped in the snow on the side of the road.
The party reaches a large camp. Some of them dismount. The camera pans up to view a large wooden house in the center.
The camera moves through the camp, to show some of the women working.
Jon, Sam, and Grenn all look at Edd, surprised.
INT. CRASTER’S LODGE
Craster, Mormont, and a number of watchmen sit around a fire.
Jon takes a seat at the fire.
As the conversation continues, Jon looks around at some of Craster’s daughters in the rafters.
Craster looks at the watchman sitting next to Mormont and points.
Mormont beckons to the watchman, who begrudgingly hands Mormont the axe.
The crows all leave the lodge.
EXT. IN THE CAMP
Mormont roughly grabs Jon and pins him against a wooden post.
EXT. BEACH
The camera pans down from the red comet to Maester Cressen, holding a torch and running. Melisandre can be heard speaking in the distance.
Cressen approaches a group gathered on the beach, burning some effigies. Melisandre is speaking to them.
Cressen reaches the group and hands his torch to another man.
After a long silence, Melisandre approaches Cressen and caresses his face.
After a moment, Cressen begrudgingly stands aside.
Stannis approaches one of the burning effigies as everyone else looks on. He pulls a sword out from the base and carries it high, to applause. When he sticks it in the sand, the crowd kneels.
Stannis then walks away, almost forgetting to bring his wife with him. The rest of the crowd gets up to leave moments later. Davos and Cressen stay behind a moment to talk.
Cressen looks crestfallen. Davos walks away with the sword. Cressen looks up at the burning effigies.
Matthos reads out a letter for Stannis to proofread, as they and some other characters sit around a table.
Matthos scratches ‘beloved’ off of the letter, and then continues.
Matthos adds in ‘the Kingslayer,’ and continues. Davos notices Cressen slip something into his own glass of wine.
Cressen stands up with the drugged glass of wine, and walks over to where Melisandre is sitting.

Melisandre stands up. Everyone at the table reaches for their own wine glasses. Cressen takes a sip of the drugged wine and offers it to Melisandre. Davos nervously watches her take the glass. Cressen begins to stumble and bleed from his nose. Melisandre drink a large portion of the wine. As he falls to the floor dead, Davos and many others stand up.
